节点.功能描述: Switch cellular data services to another card, without changing the default settings. The value {@code 0} indicates card 1, and the value {@code 1} indicates card 2. 2. Incorrect parameter types.

@param { AsyncCallback<void> } callback - The callback of setDefaultCellularDataSlotId.
@throws { BusinessError } 202 - Non-system applications use system APIs.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified.
@throws { BusinessError } 8301001 - SIM card is not activated.
@systemapi Hide this for inner system use.

节点.功能描述:
Obtain the connection state of the PS domain. which can be any of the following:
  • {@code DataConnectState#DATA_STATE_UNKNOWN}
  • {@code DataConnectState#DATA_STATE_DISCONNECTED}
  • {@code DataConnectState#DATA_STATE_CONNECTING}
  • {@code DataConnectState#DATA_STATE_CONNECTED}
  • {@code DataConnectState#DATA_STATE_SUSPENDED}
注释信息: @param { AsyncCallback<DataConnectState> } callback - Indicates the callback for getting the connection state,

parameters.说明: Indicates the callback for getting the connection state,

  • {@code DataConnectState#DATA_STATE_CONNECTED}
  • {@code DataConnectState#DATA_STATE_SUSPENDED}
注释信息: @returns { Promise<DataConnectState> } Returns the connection state, which can be any of the following:

parameters.说明: The APN ID which is used to be set.

节点.功能描述: Defines the APN info.
Indicates APN name.
Indicates APN.
Indicates APN mcc.
Indicates APN mcc.
Indicates APN user.
Indicates APN type.
Indicates APN proxy.
Indicates APN mmsproxy.
Describes the cellular data flow type.
Indicates that there is no uplink or downlink data.
Indicates that there is only downlink data.
Indicates that there is only uplink data.
Indicates that there is uplink and downlink data.
Indicates that there is no uplink or downlink data, and the bottom-layer link is in the dormant state.
